query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of an electrical storm over a body of water. A jagged lightning bolt descends from overcast clouds above a dark, distant shoreline or band of trees, while the lower portion of the frame shows a dark water surface extending toward a low horizon beneath extensive cloud cover.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Heavily blurred and grainy, this black and white photograph of an electrical storm uses intentional soft focus and analog-style film grain to obscure the landscape into smeared, textureless forms. A jagged lightning bolt descends from muted, washed-out clouds above an indistinct dark shoreline reflected in shadowy water, while crushed midtones and weak separation between light and dark create a suffocating, dread-filled atmosphere that privileges mood over fine detail.
